calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,300p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca10 --docket 69180294 --event evt-appeal-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca10 --docket 69180294 --event evt-appeal-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/ca10/69180294/events/evt-appeal-disposition -maxdepth 4 -type f -print | sort && find data/cases/ca10/69180294 -path '*/record/*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca10/69180294/events/evt-appeal-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca10/69180294/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca10/69180294/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i -C 5 'appeal|ca10|tenth|disposition' metrics/statpack.md | head -n 240 && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca10 --era 2020s --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing");exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"ca10",q:"Social Security disability substantial evidence harmless error",filed_before:"2024-09-20",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","docketNumber","judge","status","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if(c.type==="image") im

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i -C 4 'appeal-disposition|kind: appeal|decision_target: disposition|appeal.*granted|appeal.*denied' docs src tests schemas .github/prompts | head -n 260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)
